positive: A highly intricate and symmetrical composition of a celestial woodland spirit, designed as a maximalist tattoo flash sheet suitable for textile printing. The central figure is a majestic, stylized fox surrounded by detailed botanical elements, moons, stars, and glowing arcane flora. Style is a fusion of Art Nouveau illustration and detailed geometric linework, executed entirely in solid black silhouette and limited complementary colors (deep sapphire, emerald green, and gold leaf accents). Composition must be centered, highly detailed, and maintain strong, flat contrast with clean, sharp edges, emphasizing clean lines and graphic quality. Ideal for a vintage mythological motif.
